title: Sri Lanka Arrests 22 Monks After 240 Pounds of Cannabis Found in Luggage
summary_full: The group of Buddhist monks were arrested on Saturday at the country’s main international airport after a trip to Thailand that the authorities said was a cover for narcotics trafficking.
summary_public: The group of Buddhist monks were arrested on Saturday at the country’s main international airport after a trip to Thailand that the authorities said was a cover for narcotics trafficking.
